title: Incorrect result for query that uses MIN() and a CAST on rowid
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(x INT, y TEXT, z DOUBLE PRECISION, UNIQUE(x));
INSERT INTO t2(x, y, z) VALUES (NULL, 'test', 1.5);
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT y, CAST(z AS INT) AS z_int FROM t2 WHERE x IS NULL;
INSERT INTO t2(x, y, z) VALUES (1, 'example', NULL);
key_bug_features: MIN() function with CAST on rowid in view
